compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add security and performance classification items to all reviewer-delta files
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add two permanent lightweight classification checklist items to each of the 6 reviewer-delta files. Items ask the reviewer to flag whether the diff warrants specialized overlay review.

### Implementation
Add an "## Overlay Classification" section to each delta file with:
- [ ] security_overlay_warranted: Does this diff touch authentication, authorization, cryptography, session management, trust boundaries, or sensitive data handling? (yes/no — include in summary field)
- [ ] performance_overlay_warranted: Does this diff touch database queries, caching, connection pools, async/concurrent patterns, or batch processing? (yes/no — include in summary field)

Items must appear in the reviewer output within the existing summary field (NOT as new top-level JSON keys — validate-review-output.sh enforces exactly 3 top-level keys).

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-standard.md
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-deep-arch.md
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-deep-correctness.md
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-deep-hygiene.md
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-deep-verification.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Each of the 6 delta files contains overlay classification section
  Verify: for f in plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-*.md; do grep -q "security_overlay_warranted" "$f" || exit 1; done
- [ ] Classification items produce output within existing summary field (no new top-level JSON keys)
  Verify: grep -q "include in summary field" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md

comments.body: Fixed: GREEN implementation committed in a06e8c4e
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
